headline: Comcast Co-CEO Highlights Peacock Sports Surge, Simpler Broadband Pricing at Morgan Stanley TMT Conference
summary: Comcast (NASDAQ:CMCSA) Co-CEO Mike Cavanagh used an appearance at Morgan Stanley’s TMT conference to highlight what he called a “very big month” for the company in February and to outline priorities across connectivity, wireless, parks, and streaming.
